Hero.title: All your PDF tools in one place
Hero.subtitle: All the tools you need to use PDFs, right at your fingertips. All are 100% FREE, secure and easy to use.

merge-pdf.name: Merge PDF
merge-pdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document.

split-pdf.name: Split PDF
split-pdf.description: Separate one page or a whole set for easy conversion into independent PDF files.

remove-pages.name: Remove pages
remove-pages.description: Remove unwanted pages from your PDF.

extract-pages.name: Extract pages
extract-pages.description: Extract specific pages to create a new PDF.

organize-pdf.name: Organize PDF
organize-pdf.description: Sort, add and delete PDF pages.

compress-pdf.name: Compress PDF
compress-pdf.description: Reduce file size while optimizing for maximal PDF quality.

repair-pdf.name: Repair PDF
repair-pdf.description: Repair a damaged or corrupted PDF file.

flatten-pdf.name: Flatten PDF
flatten-pdf.description: Flatten forms and annotations in your PDF.

pdf-to-word.name: PDF to Word
pdf-to-word.description: Convert your PDFs to editable Word documents.

pdf-to-excel.name: PDF to Excel
pdf-to-excel.description: Convert PDF tables into Excel spreadsheets.

pdf-to-ppt.name: PDF to PowerPoint
pdf-to-ppt.description: Turn your PDFs into PowerPoint presentations.

pdf-to-jpg.name: PDF to JPG
pdf-to-jpg.description: Convert each PDF page into a JPG image.

pdf-to-png.name: PDF to PNG
pdf-to-png.description: Export your PDF pages to high quality PNG images.

pdf-to-html.name: PDF to HTML
pdf-to-html.description: Convert your PDF to an HTML web page.

pdf-to-pdfa.name: PDF to PDF/A
pdf-to-pdfa.description: Convert your PDF to PDF/A for long-term archiving.

word-to-pdf.name: Word to PDF
word-to-pdf.description: Convert your Word documents to PDF.

excel-to-pdf.name: Excel to PDF
excel-to-pdf.description: Turn your Excel spreadsheets into PDF.

ppt-to-pdf.name: PowerPoint to PDF
ppt-to-pdf.description: Convert your PowerPoint presentations to PDF.

jpg-to-pdf.name: JPG to PDF
jpg-to-pdf.description: Combine your JPG images into a PDF document.

png-to-pdf.name: PNG to PDF
png-to-pdf.description: Convert your PNG images into a PDF file.

html-to-pdf.name: HTML to PDF
html-to-pdf.description: Convert an HTML web page into a PDF document.

edit-pdf.name: Edit PDF
edit-pdf.description: Add text, images, shapes or freehand annotations to a PDF.

rotate-pdf.name: Rotate PDF
rotate-pdf.description: Rotate your PDFs the way you need them.

add-page-numbers.name: Add page numbers
add-page-numbers.description: Add page numbers into PDFs with ease.

add-watermark.name: Add watermark
add-watermark.description: Stamp an image or text over your PDF in seconds.

sign-pdf.name: Sign PDF
sign-pdf.description: Sign yourself or request electronic signatures from others.

redact-pdf.name: Redact PDF
redact-pdf.description: Hide sensitive information in your PDF.

crop-pdf.name: Crop PDF
crop-pdf.description: Crop PDF margins, change PDF page size.

protect-pdf.name: Protect PDF
protect-pdf.description: Protect PDF files with a password.

compare-pdf.name: Compare PDF
compare-pdf.description: Compare two PDF files and identify differences.

ai-pdf-summary.name: AI Summary
ai-pdf-summary.description: Get a smart summary of your PDF document.

ai-pdf-chat.name: Chat with PDF
ai-pdf-chat.description: Ask questions to your PDF using Artificial Intelligence.

ai-pdf-translate.name: Translate PDF
ai-pdf-translate.description: Translate your PDF document into another language with AI.

edit-metadata.name: Edit metadata
edit-metadata.description: Edit the title, author and other metadata of your PDF.

pdf-info.name: PDF Info
pdf-info.description: View all technical information of your PDF file.

add-stamp.name: Add stamp
add-stamp.description: Add a text or image stamp to your PDF pages.

add-attachments.name: PDF Attachments
add-attachments.description: Embed files as attachments in your PDF document.

extract-images.name: Extract images
extract-images.description: Extract all embedded images from your PDF.

remove-images.name: Remove images
remove-images.description: Delete all images from your PDF to reduce size.

multi-page-layout.name: N-up
multi-page-layout.description: Arrange 2, 4, 6 or 9 PDF pages on a single sheet.

overlay-pdf.name: Overlay PDF
overlay-pdf.description: Overlay one PDF on another (background, header, signature).

sanitize-pdf.name: Sanitize PDF
sanitize-pdf.description: Remove JavaScript, links and sensitive metadata from your PDF.

remove-blanks.name: Remove blank pages
remove-blanks.description: Automatically detect and remove blank pages from your PDF.

Home.security_desc: Your files never leave your device. All processing is done locally in your browser.
Home.speed_desc: With no server uploads, processing is instantaneous and doesn't depend on your internet connection.
Home.no_signup_desc: Start immediately. No need to create an account or provide your email to use the tools.

Cookies.message: We use cookies to enhance your experience and show relevant ads. By clicking "Accept", you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with our
